2238370.name: RareIcon
2238370.description:
RareIcon is a 2D sci-fi Action-RPG shooter set in the corrupted neon-glow of a failing galactic economy.

As a debt-enslaved worker in the Great Cyber Year 2101, your only path to survival is through hacking, looting pay-data, and resisting the soul crushing descent into bio-commoditized servitude.

Blending bullet-hell rogue-lite chaos with strategic base building, Rareicon challenges you to survive escalating system threats, upgrade your sanctuary, and carve a glitch-ridden path through a collapsing info-sphere.

Armed with a jury-rigged neural implant and a dying social credit score, you play as Chip, a last generational human, who is debt ridden and scraping through the data-slums of the nebulae.

You'll navigate procedurally generated zones riddled with hostile DaemonCorps patrols, broken AI, corrupted data vaults, and reality bending demon-like anomalies.

Core gameplay combines WASD movement with mouse-based shooting, blending responsive point-and-click precision with spell casting and auto-aim support tools to handle the digital chaos.

Along the way, you'll recruit fellow outcasts, rogue constructs, and glitch-born entities to join your fight against the megastructure.

Every run chips away at your identity, but also chips back at the system.


Will you escape the purge or become digital ghost matter?

Key Features

  • Bullet-Hell Roguelite Combat

Engage in fast-paced, chaotic encounters where every frame counts.

Survive swarms of projectiles, environmental hazards, and evolving digital threats.

  • WASM + Twin-Stick Shooting with Tactical Depth

Use WASD movement and mouse-aimed shooting alongside spells and automated support tools to adapt to high-speed combat scenarios.

  • Strategic Base Building

Between missions, collect resources and schematics to upgrade your sanctuary.

Automate systems, unlock new functionality, and expand your influence in the dataslums.

  • Recruitable Allies and Party Dynamics

Find and recruit a variety of unique companions—from rogue AIs to glitch-born anomalies—each offering distinct abilities, synergy potential, and upgrade paths.

  • Vast Inventory and Modular Items

Collect, craft, and combine hundreds of modular items that impact combat, exploration, and progression.

Experiment with loadouts to push your build further every run.

  • Procedurally Generated Worlds

Explore ever-changing zones filled with randomized encounters, secrets, and challenges.

No two runs are the same.

  • Cyber-Dystopian Storytelling

Uncover the truth behind the Daemoncorps and your commoditized existence.

Dialogue, data fragments, and ambient storytelling immerse you in the fractured future.

  • Distinct Visual and Audio Identity

Experience glitch-infused pixel art and a synthwave-driven soundtrack that mirrors the instability of the digital wastelands.
